title: WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Jodhpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions:
WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WOW Skin Science Ventures Solutions!
